best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-navigation-002 title: navigate to guide module: navigation source pages: 3 preconditions: user is logged in and at the home page. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. start at the home page. 2. access the menu. 3. check if the user wants to access the menu. 4. if no, navigate to the guide. expected result: user should be directed to the guide page.
